lineage.Process: AddField Sempadan_Operasi_Perlis NAMA_PBT TEXT # # 50 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_Perlis SINGKATAN TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_Perlis NEGERI TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_Perlis luas_h DOUBLE 12 4 # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_Perlis pbt_id TEXT # # 6 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_Perlis kemaskini DATE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_Perlis tahun_data SHORT # # 4 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_Perlis catatan TEXT # # 150 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
